title: pretrea zanguebarica
intro: Pretrea zanguebarica is a plant species native to tropical Africa, classified as a member of the Apocynaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, malaria, and other infections due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Pretrea zanguebarica include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which is used to treat various ailments, and its roots are also used to make a medicinal paste.
